utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Next, verify each is fully specified with required details. 1) health_coverage: Required 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. Plan provides physical (€200/month) and mental (€130/month) plus total and benefits. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: Required 'home/contents insurance with costs'. Plan includes home_contents (€90/month) and adventure_equipment (€35/month) with total and benefits. It covers contents with costs; this satisfies the item. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: Required 'travel insurance with costs'. Plan includes a plan at €110/month and benefits. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: Required 'any enhancement services with costs'. Plan lists services but does not provide separate costs; it says 'Implicitly included'. Lacks explicit costs, so not fully specified. 5) total_budget: Required 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. Plan includes monthly, annual, and category breakdown. Fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific named plans: PrimeCare Premium Plan for both physical and mental health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage for home contents, Adventure Equipment Protection (not present in ground truth), and EliteTravel Premium Plan for travel. From the ground-truth ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan appears under both primary health physical and mental health with ratings 6 and 4 respectively; PrimeHome Premium Coverage is listed under property_protection.home_content with rating 6; EliteTravel Premium Plan is listed under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 5. 'Adventure Equipment Protection' does not exist in the ground-truth list, so it cannot be mapped and is omitted from RATINGS as required.
